name: Grilled Teriyaki Swordfish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-reactive bowl, combine the soy sauce, pineapple juice, sherry, brown sugar, ginger and lemon juice.
2. Place the swordfish steaks in a heavy plastic bag and pour in the marinade. Seal the bag.
3. Refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours, turning the bag occasionally to thoroughly marinate all surfaces of the fish.
4. Remove the swordfish from the bag and grill over high heat, 4-5 minutes on each side, turning once.
5. Be careful not to overcook the swordfish; it dries out quickly (the fish is done when the flesh is opaque and flakes easily with a fork).
6. Serve with lightly grilled slices of pineapple and baked sweet potatoes.
